findings.description: The signature block is duplicated: the handwritten signature image includes the surrounding text ('Sincerely,', 'David Miller, PE', 'State Mining Engineer'), and these same elements are also rendered as separate HTML text, causing the reader to encounter them twice.
findings.evidence: PDF shows one 'Sincerely,' line, one signature, and one 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer' block. HTML shows 'Sincerely,' as text, then an image containing 'Sincerely,' + signature + 'David Miller, PE / State Mining Engineer', then again 'David Miller, PE' and 'State Mining Engineer' as HTML text.
